title: ferray-stride-tricks: as_strided only accepts usize strides — no negative strides
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

as_strided() and as_strided_unchecked() take strides as &[usize], which means negative strides are impossible. NumPy's as_strided accepts negative strides (for reversed views, transposed views with reversed axes, etc.). The safe variant converts to isize internally for the overlap check but the public API only accepts unsigned. Change strides parameter to &[isize] to support negative strides. The unchecked variant especially needs this for advanced stride patterns.
